entities.name: Arjun Rao
entities.description: Logistics broker coordinating warehouse transfers across the east corridor.

entities.name: Meera Sen
entities.description: Financial analyst whose reports surfaced in multiple shell-company audits.

entities.name: Northstar Imports
entities.description: Import-export firm with mismatched manifests and repeated customs exceptions.

entities.name: Dock 14
entities.description: Transit storage site connected to three irregular shipments this quarter.

entities.name: Ledger-Blue
entities.description: Encrypted bookkeeping archive recovered from a seized courier tablet.

events.title: Customs anomaly review
events.summary: Manifest discrepancies link Northstar Imports to an unregistered cold-chain route.

events.title: Warehouse camera match
events.summary: Vehicle plate tied to Arjun Rao appears during an off-hours cargo transfer.

events.title: Forensic ledger extraction
events.summary: Partial decryption of Ledger-Blue reveals transfers matching Meera Sen's analysis drafts.

events.title: Dock 14 inspection
events.summary: Inspectors document tampered refrigeration seals and unsigned handoff forms.
